name: Mornaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl, melt the butter.
2. Add flour and stir until smooth (about 1 minute).
3. Gradually add milk while stirring continuously.
4. Beat egg yolks in a separate bowl.
5. Stir in whipping cream.
6. Gradually combine the hot sauce mixture with the egg yolk mixture.
7. Add Swiss cheese at the end.
